basic_details.job_title: IIT Mandi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi (IIT Mandi) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 01 June 2026 on the official website www.iitmandi.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Mandi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering or Aerospace Engineering or Materials Engineering or related areas
qualification.details: M.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering or Aerospace Engineering or Materials Engineering or related areas

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Mandi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Mandi JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IIT Mandi JRF Recruitment 2026 is 15th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess an M.Tech. degree in Mechanical Engineering, Aerospace Engineering, Materials Engineering, or a related field to be eligible for the JRF position.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the JRF post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position in the IIT Mandi Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the JRF post will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the IIT Mandi JRF Recruitment 2026 must be submitted via email.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the IIT Mandi JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category of candidates applying for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the JRF position involves shortlisting of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this IIT Mandi JRF Recruitment is IITM/SRIC/DRDO-AR&DB/SZ/563/2026.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Mandi located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi is located in Mandi, Himachal Pradesh, with the pincode 175075.

faq.question: Q10. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at the Indian Institute of Technology Mandi.
